description: Brazilian practice management platform for medical clinics. Provides scheduling, electronic health records, billing, and patient relationship management. Focus on small and medium medical practices in Brazil.
business_model: B2B SaaS - Practice management to medical clinics
target_market: Small and medium medical practices in Brazil
competitive_advantage: Brazilian market focus, integrated platform, local market understanding

varden_fit.rationale: Latin American practice management - demonstrates regional opportunity
